admin.lowOccupancyDesc: Classes in the next 24h with less than 30% occupancy
admin.searchClasses: Search by type, coach or tag...
admin.cancelClassConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel {className} on {date}? Enrolled students will be notified and their credits refunded.
admin.scheduleSubtitle: Weekly view — click on class for details, click on empty cell to create
admin.coachesSubtitle: Manage the team and review performance
admin.coachEmailOptional: Email is optional. If provided, an invitation to access the coach portal will be sent.
admin.waitlistAppearsWhen: Waitlists appear when a class reaches its maximum capacity
admin.noWaiverDesc: Create a liability agreement for your clients to sign before their first class.
admin.htmlHint: You can use HTML. Available variables:
admin.waiverPlaceholder: Write or paste your waiver content here...
admin.publishExistingSignatures: What happens with the {count} clients who already signed?
admin.keepSignaturesDesc: Recommended for minor changes. Only new clients sign the new version.
admin.requestResignDesc: Existing clients will receive a reminder to sign again.
admin.publishVisible: Once published, the waiver will be visible to all your clients.
admin.onBookingDesc: Shows the waiver right after booking a class
admin.onAppOpenDesc: Only if they have a future booking and have not signed
admin.emailAfterBookingDesc: If they did not sign after booking, a reminder email is sent
admin.reminder1hBeforeDesc: Reminder email if they still have not signed
admin.blockCheckinDesc: The admin will see a warning in the roster and can send the link to the client's phone
admin.createWaiverFirst: Create a waiver first to configure it
admin.tapToBlockUnblock: Tap a spot to block or unblock it
admin.activateBlockingMode: Activate blocking mode to select spots on the map
admin.genericBlockingDesc: Block generic spots to reduce available capacity
admin.blockingNotesPlaceholder: E.g.: Spot 5 reserved for special guest Maria Garcia. Spot 8 out of service for maintenance...
admin.spotHasBooking: That spot has an active booking
admin.atRiskDescription: Members with prior activity who haven't attended in over 14 days
admin.studiosAndRoomsDesc: Manage your studios, locations and rooms
admin.createFirstStudioDesc: Create your first studio to get started
admin.newCityDesc: This is used to organize studios by location. Usually configured only once.
admin.editRoomDesc: Modify the details and layout of the room
admin.newRoomDesc: Configure the room and design the spot distribution
admin.layoutInstructions: Click on the cells to place spots and the coach position. The coach spot cannot be booked.
admin.noLayoutDesc: No visual distribution. Clients book a spot without selecting a position.
admin.saveErrorDesc: Could not save changes. Verify that you have admin permissions.
admin.homeHeadlineDesc: Appears below the "Hi, name" on your members' home.
admin.landingPageDesc: If you have your own website, put it here. The navbar logo will redirect to that URL. Leave empty to use the built-in landing.
admin.logoHint: PNG, SVG or JPG. Transparent background recommended.
admin.appIconHint: Square PNG, minimum 512x512px. Appears when installing as app.
admin.coachIconHint: Monochrome SVG. Used for the coach spot in the class map. Color is applied automatically.
admin.classMapPreview: This is how it will look in the class map
admin.discoverClasses: Discover our classes, book your spot and transform your routine.
admin.clickToChangeColor: Click on the color to change it
admin.colorsAutoAdjust: Background, text, border and surface colors are automatically adjusted.
admin.darkSectionsPreview: This is how dark sections look
admin.landingBgHint: Dark sections of your landing page
admin.selectClassRoster: Select a class to view the roster
admin.noCategoriesCreateOne: No categories. Create one to start adding products.
admin.categoriesGroupProducts: Categories group products in the store.
admin.addNewProductToStore: Add a new product to your store
admin.externalLinkHint: If filled, the client will be redirected to this link instead of buying on the platform.
admin.clientsCanBuy: Clients can see and purchase this product
admin.onlySellFromStudio: Can only be sold from the studio
admin.packagesSubtitle: Introductory offers, credit packages and recurring subscriptions
admin.editPackageDesc: Update prices, validity, disciplines and visibility.
admin.newPackageDesc: Define type, price and usage rules. No disciplines selected = all.
admin.typeCannotChange: Type cannot be changed when editing.
admin.perDisciplineHint: Assign independent credits to each discipline. Leave at 0 for those that don't apply.
admin.noSelectionAllDisciplines: No selection = all disciplines. Check only if you want to restrict.
admin.validDaysMin1: Valid days must be at least 1.
admin.addCreditsToOneDiscipline: Add credits to at least one discipline.
admin.creditsNumberOrUnlimited: Enter a number of credits or mark as unlimited.
admin.creditsValidNumber: Credits must be a valid number.
admin.searchTransactions: Search by name, amount or method...
admin.retentionDescription: Percentage of members still active (attended in the last 30 days), grouped by tenure
admin.retentionWarning: Some cohorts are below 60% retention. A healthy benchmark is >60% at 90 days.
admin.noActiveSubscriptionsDesc: When a member subscribes to a recurring plan, it will appear here
admin.disciplinesSubtitle: Class types available at the studio
admin.noDisciplinesDesc: Create your first discipline to schedule classes
admin.newDisciplineDesc: Define a new class type for the studio
admin.mediaFeedHint: Shown when tapping the discipline in the feed
admin.deleteDisciplineConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
admin.disciplinesInFeedDesc: Shows the "Discover our disciplines" section to new members
admin.conversionSubtitle: Automations to convert clients to monthly memberships.
admin.noDataForPeriod: No data for this period yet.
admin.bookingFlowDesc: Show membership options during the booking flow
admin.introOfferDesc: Special offer for a client's first visit
admin.savingsEmailDesc: Automatic email with the member's accumulated savings
admin.packageUpgradeDesc: Offer membership upgrade when package is running out
admin.remainingClassesTrigger: Remaining classes that trigger the nudge
admin.applyProportionalCredit: Apply proportional credit from remaining package
admin.marketingSubtitle: Share studio links, track where your clients come from, and connect your analytics tools.
admin.platformsSubtitle: ClassPass and Gympass — quotas, bookings and export
admin.hlPageSubtitle: Featured banners that appear in your members' feed. Upload images and link to any destination.
admin.hlVisibleToMembers: Members see the section in their feed
admin.hlHiddenFromAll: The section is hidden for everyone
admin.hlNoHighlightsDesc: Create your first highlight with an image and a link. Your members will see it in their feed.
admin.hlImageCropHint: The image is center-cropped and auto-compressed to {width}x{height}px.
admin.hlTitlePlaceholder: Leave empty for a clean look
